# Task: Audit Section Pages — Back Yard & After Shows

**ID:** p02-03
**Status:** pending
**Depends on:** p02-01
**Context size:** medium

## Goal

Compare all Back Yard and After Shows section pages (live vs local).

## Inputs

- Phase context: `phase-02/context.md`
- Issue count from p02-02

## Pages to Audit (11)

### Back Yard (6)
1. `/back-yard` — Back Yard (section root)
2. `/back-yard/about-circus-living` — About Circus Living
3. `/back-yard/kiarras-finds` — About Kiarra's Finds
4. `/back-yard/montreal-visit-with-kids` — Experiencing Montreal
5. `/back-yard/quebec-road-trips` — Experiencing Quebec
6. `/back-yard/travel-bucket-list` — Our "Jumps" & Travels

### After Shows (5)
7. `/after-shows` — After Shows (section root)
8. `/after-shows/art-blogs` — Magazines Accepting Art Submissions
9. `/after-shows/art-galleries-looking-for-submissions` — Art Galleries Looking for Submissions
10. `/after-shows/artist-opportunities` — Where to sell, showcase, or submit your art
11. `/after-shows/call-for-artists-app` — Call for Artists App

## Steps

For each page:
1. Navigate to live URL → screenshot
2. Navigate to local URL → screenshot
3. Compare: hero, title, content, images, footer
4. Console + network check
5. Document issues

## Outputs

- Screenshots per page
- Continued issue list

## Done When

- [ ] All 11 pages compared
- [ ] All discrepancies documented
